scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/api dev" "npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/web dev"
scripts.build: npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/shared build && npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/api build && npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/web build
scripts.test: npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/shared test && npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/api test && npx pnpm@9.15.4 --filter @mde/web test
